summary: Full re-test of PartStation.in after Flipkart/Amazon-style redesign + separate admin login portal. Backend regression 35/35 pytest PASS (no regressions). Frontend: admin login at /admin/login works, non-admin (customer) correctly rejected with 'not an administrator' error, admin dashboard shows stat cards (Revenue ₹11,694 / Orders 4 / Products 41 / Customers 5) + Recent Orders table, all 9 admin sidebar pages load. CRITICAL BUG FROM ITERATION 1 IS FIXED: customer purchase flow now correctly redirects to /order-success/:id with data-testid='order-number' showing PS26061005 after Place Order. Order persists and appears in /account. Search by printer model (HP LaserJet 1020, Epson L3110) returns correct compatible parts. Zero console errors across all tested flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout race fix verified: navigate('/order-success/:id') runs before clearCart() and a placedRef guard skips the empty-cart redirect after order placement.
Admin guard works correctly: AdminLayout redirects to /admin/login when role!=='admin', and /admin/login surfaces a friendly error when a customer attempts to log in.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event handlers; migrating to FastAPI lifespan is non-blocking but advised.
CORS still has allow_credentials=True with allow_origins default '*'; safe today (auth via Bearer header) but invalid per spec — set explicit origins or disable credentials.
server.py is large (~750 lines); splitting into routers (auth/catalog/orders/admin) would improve maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (admin login, dashboard, 9 admin pages, search by printer model, full customer purchase flow incl. order-success redirect, product detail, account, storefront pages)

test_credentials: Admin admin@partstation.com / Admin@12345 verified. Ad-hoc customer registered via /api/auth/register with password Test@12345 used for purchase flow.
seed_data_creation: Created one customer order PS26061005 (COD, total ₹4,798) via end-to-end UI flow as proof of the order-success redirect fix. Earlier orders PS26061001-1004 already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v). Admin login lives at /admin/login (separate dark portal) with testids admin-login-email, admin-login-password, admin-auth-submit. AdminLayout enforces role==='admin' and redirects otherwise. Customer purchase flow regression covered: /shop -> add-to-cart -> /checkout (addr-* fields, checkout-cod-radio, place-order-button) -> /order-success/:id (data-testid=order-number).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — iteration_1 checkout race condition is fully resolved in this build.
